message:
feat(linalg): implement P2C-008 linalg contract validation with shape, solver, decomposition, and policy checks

Replace placeholder fnp-linalg crate with ~693 lines of linear algebra
contract validation implementing Phase 2C Packet FNP-P2C-008:

Core types and infrastructure:
- LinAlgError enum with 10 typed variants (shape violation, singularity,
  Cholesky positive-definite violation, QR mode error, SVD non-convergence,
  spectral convergence failure, lstsq tuple violation, norm/det/rank policy,
  backend bridge error, unknown policy metadata) — each maps to a reason code
- QrMode enum (Reduced/Complete/R/Raw) matching NumPy's linalg.qr modes
- LinAlgRuntimeMode (Strict/Hardened) for fail-closed policy enforcement
- LinAlgLogRecord with replay completeness validation for audit trails

Validation functions:
- validate_matrix_shape: rank >= 2, non-zero dims, batch lane budget
- validate_square_matrix: additionally checks rows == cols
- solve_2x2: Cramer's rule solver with singularity detection
- validate_cholesky_diagonal: positive-definite diagonal check
- qr_output_shapes / svd_output_shapes / lstsq_output_shapes: compute
  expected decomposition output dimensions for all mode variants
- validate_spectral_branch: uplo + convergence checking
- validate_tolerance_policy: rcond and search depth bounds
- validate_backend_bridge: backend support + revalidation budget
- validate_policy_metadata: fail-closed mode/class validation

16 tests including 256-seed grid test for solve_2x2, reason code
round-tripping through log records, and replay completeness validation.

Add unit_property_evidence.json artifact for P2C-008 packet.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
